items.title: The Giants' Pride Firestorm Comes for the Press Box
items.author: House of Strauss
items.body_excerpt: We are somehow on Day 18 of the San Francisco Giants Pride Hat controversy . We’ve reached the point where, according to my informed speculation, a beat writer has accidentally angered players with her public comments and is now engaged in damage control. I can relate to that…

items.title: Free agent Simone Fontecchio intends to sign a one-year deal to return to the Miami Heat, sources tell ESPN. Heat officials worked with Fontecchio's agent at Excel Sports Management, Sam Goldfeder, to bring back the shooter who averaged 8.5 points and 37.5% 3-point shooting.

items.title: Stan Remy is a legendary skills trainer to the NBA stars. His gym. His fortress. His lab…in Miami.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Stan Remy is a legendary skills trainer to the NBA stars. His gym. His fortress. His lab…in Miami.

What an honor. 

An NBA Top 10 player was gettin in his work while I was signing. Caught some dap 👊🏽 ♥️ from him.

I don’t opine about players. I actually talk to them.I’ll be with your fav player today

items.title: Today is officially my last day at CBS Sports after being laid off.
items.author: Jasmyn Wimbish
items.body_excerpt:
Today is officially my last day at CBS Sports after being laid off.

With that being said, I’m still searching for my next full-time position within the sports media industry, but I’m open to freelance opportunities until then. 

So if anyone has any leads, let me know.

items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Four-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson is listed as out for tonight’s Commissioner’s Cup championship game. 

Wilson, the league’s leading scorer at 25.7 PPG, rolled her ankle Sunday and yesterday was listed as questionable with a right leg injury

items.title: Overall, this is quite a strong Summer League roster.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Overall, this is quite a strong Summer League roster.

At least 9 guys I could envision on the big league roster (if you include Two-Ways) in October.

(TBD on how much and how long guys like Flemings and Newell continue to play given the two-city marathon.)

items.title: The Blazers won the Ja-uction ... or did they?
items.author: Good Morning It's Basketball
items.body_excerpt: Portland stuns everyone by trading for Ja Morant. But why? Good morning. It's the end of June, and you know what that means: July is just around the corner. Let's basketball. Ja Morant is not Trae Young. That statement's not strictly a compliment or an insult. It's just a…
